new_invitation_received: You've received a new private invitation!
no_account: Don't have an account? Sign up
no_account_create: Don't have an account? Create one
no_description: No description available for this invitation.
no_external_links: ⚠️ External links or social media accounts are not allowed in profile
no_members_yet: No members yet. Share your community to grow.
no_messages: No messages yet. Start the conversation!
no_participants_affected: No participants were affected by this cancellation.
no_public_posts: No public posts yet. Be the first to post!
no_subscription_needed: No subscription required for these packs
not_at_venue_yet:
😊 It looks like you're not at the venue yet

You can complete the invitation once you arrive at the restaurant
not_group_member: You are not a member of this invitation group chat.
notif_msg_booking_cancelled: A booking at your venue was cancelled.
notif_msg_booking_confirmed: A booking at your venue was confirmed.
notif_msg_completed: The invitation is complete. We hope you had a great time!
notif_msg_message: You have a new message from {{name}}
notif_msg_reminder: Your invitation is coming up soon
notif_msg_request_approved: Your request to join was approved
notif_msg_updated: The invitation time was updated. Please confirm your attendance again.
notification_join_accept: Your request to join was accepted
notification_private_invitation_message: {{name}} has invited you to a private occasion: {{title}}
notifications_failed: Failed to enable notifications. Permission might have been denied.
offer_delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this offer permanently?
offer_freeze_confirm: Are you sure you want to freeze this offer? It will be removed from the active carousel.
offer_republish_confirm: Are you sure you want to republish this offer?
offline_no_connection: No internet connection. Please check your network.
on_way_too_early: You can only send "I'm on my way" up to 1 hour before the invitation time.
one_invitation_per_day: You already have an invitation today. You can only create one invitation per day.
only_host_can_complete: Only the host can complete the invitation
only_image_stories: Only images are supported for stories.
open_notification_settings_desc: Push, email, sounds, and quiet hours
page_not_found_hint: This link may be wrong or the page has moved. Try Home or Login below.
partner_pricing_desc: Professional solutions to grow your business and reach thousands
password_min_6_chars: Password must be at least 6 characters
password_reset_done_sign_in_social: Password updated. Sign in with Google, Facebook, or Apple for your personal account.
plan_activated: Your plan has been activated immediately
please_fill_required_fields: Please fill in all required fields
please_invite_at_least_one_guest: Please invite at least one guest for a private invitation
please_invite_one_person: Please invite someone for your date
please_select_age_group: Please select at least one age group
please_select_gender_group: Please select at least one gender group
please_select_member: Please select at least one member
post_delete_confirm: Delete this post permanently? This cannot be undone.
post_deleted: This post may have been deleted.
post_edit_denied: You can only edit your own posts.
post_failed: Failed to create post. Try again.
prevent_fraud: To prevent fraud and ensure platform security.
preview_reminder: Remember: Your invitation will only be visible to guests after you click 'Publish Invitation'
preview_unsaved_warning: Your invitation has not been published yet. Press 'Publish' to make it available to guests.
preview_warning: This is a preview of your invitation. It has NOT been published yet and is NOT visible to other users. Click 'Publish Invitation' below to make it available to guests.
preview_warning_private: This is a preview of your private invitation. Guests won't be notified until you click 'Send Invitations'.
privacy_settings_desc: Control who can see your information and interact with you
private_card_export_error: Could not create the image. Please try again.
private_card_share_unavailable: Sharing is not available on this device. Use download instead.
private_card_show_content_label: Show occasion, title, message & profile on card
private_card_show_content_title: Off: date and place only on the card. On: show occasion headline, title, message, and profile photo.
private_card_text_backdrop_photo_only: Choose a template, photo, or video cover to see the panel on the card.
private_card_text_backdrop_title: Adds a tinted panel behind invitation text on photo backgrounds.
private_cover_ai_commit_pending: Cover saved in AI photos. It will upload when you select it or publish.
private_cover_ai_rail_empty: Use “Generate with AI” above to create covers (up to {{max}}).
private_cover_ai_uploading: Saving your AI cover to storage…
private_cover_no_templates_category: No artwork files for this category yet. Add images under invitation-card-backgrounds in the app.
private_cover_stash_max_ai: You can keep up to {{max}} AI covers. Remove one from the thumbnails to generate another.
private_cover_stash_max_images: You can add up to {{max}} photos. Remove one from the thumbnails to add another.
private_cover_stash_max_videos: You can add up to {{max}} videos. Remove one from the thumbnails to record another.
private_cover_template_mode_hint: Use Camera or Upload to add a video or photo over the card.
private_cover_upload_rail_empty: Tap “Upload photo” to add from your device (up to {{max}}).
private_cover_video_rail_empty: Tap “Record video” to capture a clip (up to {{max}}).
private_cover_video_uploading: Uploading your video cover… this may take a moment.
private_desc: Only you can see your profile
private_draft_permission_denied: Could not open the draft. Sign in again and retry.
private_invitation_desc: Secret invitation only visible to people you choose from your friends list.
private_invitation_draft_banner: This invitation is still a draft — guests have not been notified yet. Open preview to review and send.
private_invitation_not_published: This invitation has not been sent yet.
private_magic_optional_intro: Not required. Use this only if you want an AI-generated cover; otherwise keep the photo or video you chose above.
private_magic_replaces_cover_note: When generation succeeds, it fills the same cover slot as your manual upload (you can switch back by picking media again).
private_magic_requires_title_location: Complete date, time, occasion, location, title, and your message before using AI.
private_magic_three_credits: Up to three credits may be charged (one per successful image). Optional — not required to publish.
private_magic_three_intro: We generate three vertical (9:16) covers suited for phones. Tap a thumbnail to use it as your invitation cover.
private_magic_three_success_all: Three AI covers are ready — pick one.
private_magic_variant_lane_a: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — warm intimate candlelit social dining, soft gold light, elegant depth, no text.
private_magic_variant_lane_b: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — stylish night-out energy, tasteful neon accents, premium nightlife mood, no text.
private_magic_variant_lane_c: Vertical 9:16 mobile hero — fresh airy daytime brunch or patio, botanical hints, natural soft light, no text.
private_media_ai_blurb: Opens a floating studio. Three 9:16 options; tap one to set as your cover.
private_section_card_art_beside_hint: Template shows artwork beside the card. Tap Upload or Video to open that tab, then tap again to add photos or record video.
private_section_card_art_hint: Choose artwork for your occasion, then add a video, photo, or template layer on the card.
private_section_five_media_hint: Add a photo or video yourself, or open the AI studio to generate three vertical cover options.
private_section_media_hint: Upload your own image or video for the invitation. You can publish without using AI.
private_section_templates_hint: Pick a background style for your occasion. This is separate from the cover photo or video below.
public_invitation_desc: Visible to everyone on the home feed. Anyone can request to join.
public_invitation_guests_hint: Public invitations appear in the feed; guests tap join on the card after you publish.
public_invite_must_be_local: Sorry, public invitations are restricted to your current local area (within a 30 km radius).
publish_permission_denied: Publishing failed: your account does not have permission to update this invitation.
push_config_error: Push is not configured on this build. Contact support.
push_diagnostics_desc: If you aren't receiving notifications, use this tool to debug your device's connection.
push_enable_failed: Please allow notifications in your browser settings.
push_enabled_success: Push notifications enabled for this device.
push_finish_register_desc: Notifications are allowed but this device is not registered yet. Tap below to complete setup.
push_ios_already_allowed: This iPhone already allows notifications. Turn on the switch below to register this device.
push_no_device_saved: No device token saved on the server yet.
push_permission_denied_ios: Notifications are blocked. iPhone Settings → Notifications → DineBuddies → Allow.
push_register_failed: Could not register this device. Open Settings → Notifications and try again.
push_sw_not_ready: Almost ready — the app will refresh once, then tap Register again.
push_token_failed: Could not register this device. Check your connection and try again.
rankings_elite_only: Only Elite subscribers are included in the ranking.
rankings_no_in_scope: No businesses in this area. Try Global.
rankings_paid_only: Only Paid Business subscribers are included in the ranking.
redirect_in_seconds: You will be redirected to home in {{count}} seconds
regular_login_is_business: This email is registered as a business account. Use Business sign in below.
remove_member_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this member from your community?
req_mix_chars: Mix of letters and numbers recommended
request_sent_waiting: Your request has been sent, waiting for invitation owner approval.
reset_data_warn: Are you sure? All your local data will be deleted.
